# upper

Converts a string to uppercase. Preserves color attributes.

## Signature

`upper(_val: str) -> str`

## Examples

```rad
upper("hello")          // -> "HELLO"
upper("Hello World")    // -> "HELLO WORLD"
```

## Category

strings
